name: Ubiquiti 120W Power TransPort Adapter
title: Ubiquiti 120W Power TransPort Adapter
short_description: TransPort power adapter for UISP devices, 120W
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-Adapter-PT-120W is a robust 120W Power TransPort Adapter designed to provide a high-performance power solution for Ubiquiti's network devices that are compatible with TransPort™ cables such as UISP Switch (UISP-S), UISP Router (UISP-R), UISP Box (UISP-Box) or UISP Power (UISP-P). The AC power cord is included.

detailed_description.heading: Overview
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UACC-Adapter-PT-120W is a robust 120W Power TransPort Adapter designed to provide a high-performance power solution for Ubiquiti's network devices that are compatible with TransPort™ cables such as UISP Switch (UISP-S), UISP Router (UISP-R), UISP Box (UISP-Box) or UISP Power (UISP-P). The AC power cord is included.

detailed_description.heading: Note
detailed_description.text: Note: Power TransPort Cable sold separately.

detailed_description.heading: Design and Compatibility
detailed_description.text: The adapter's enclosure is made from polycarbonate, a material known for its strength, durability, and resistance to impact and temperature. The UACC-Adapter-PT-120W supports a broad input voltage range of 100—240V AC, accommodating global electrical standards, and features an IEC320 C14 connector for universal compatibility. It operates within an input frequency of 50—60Hz and manages input current efficiently, drawing ≤ 1.6A at both 100V and 240V AC under full load. The adapter is equipped with a PowerTransport connector that delivers a stable 27V DC output at 4.44A, culminating in a total output of 120 watts. This power output is sufficient to support multiple devices or high-demand single devices requiring consistent power.

detailed_description.heading: Safety and Certifications
detailed_description.text: Safety is paramount with the UACC-Adapter-PT-120W, which includes ESD/EMP protection rated at Air: ± 10kV and Contact: ± 6kV. This protection shields both the adapter and connected devices from potential damage due to electrostatic discharges and electromagnetic pulses. The adapter is engineered to perform reliably in ambient temperatures ranging from 0 to 50° C. Furthermore, the UACC-Adapter-PT-120W meets rigorous international standards, holding certifications from CE, FCC, and IC.
